notableEvents.label: Fernando Tatis Jr. GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Fernando Tatis Jr. grounds into a double play, second baseman Chase Meidroth to shortstop Colson Montgomery to first baseman Munetaka Murakami. Ramón Laureano out at 2nd. Fernando Tatis Jr. out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Andrew Benintendi GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Andrew Benintendi grounds into a double play, first baseman Gavin Sheets to shortstop Xander Bogaerts. Tristan Peters out at 2nd. Andrew Benintendi out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Edgar Quero GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Edgar Quero grounds into a double play, second baseman Jake Cronenworth to shortstop Xander Bogaerts to first baseman Gavin Sheets. Sam Antonacci out at 2nd. Edgar Quero out at 1st.
